name: Unique Peach Barbecue Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a 16-ounce can of peaches, in syrup or its own juice for a less sweet sauce.
2. Put all the ingredients in a blender and blend on high speed until smooth.
3. Spoon sauce over meat, basting every 15 minutes with the drippings in the pan.
4. If used for outdoor grilling, baste after meat is about half cooked. Continue basting until meat is done.
